episodes.title: “THE PENNY HAS DROPPED FOR FERGIE” | Sarah Ferguson & Epstein Fallout
episodes.description:
Why has Sarah Ferguson disappeared from public life?

In the wake of the latest Jeffrey Epstein file releases and renewed investigations into Epstein’s London connections, questions continue to surround Prince Andrew, Sarah Ferguson and the York family.

Host Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen is joined by former spokesperson to Queen Elizabeth II and King Charles III, Dickie Arbiter, alongside the Mail on Sunday’s Editor-at-Large Charlotte Griffiths, to discuss Fergie’s absence from public life, the fallout facing Princess Beatrice and Princess Eugenie, and whether Sarah Ferguson can ever return to public favour.

From royal scandal and media scrutiny to the future of Prince Andrew and the York family, the panel explores how one of the Royal Family’s most controversial figures is attempting to navigate yet another crisis.

This episode discusses:
0:00 Fergie’s Disappearance
2:48 The Epstein Fallout
5:12 Fergie’s Reputation Problem
7:32 Who’s Protecting Fergie?
11:11 Pressure On The York Sisters
15:34 Beatrice & Eugenie’s Future
20:03 Prince Andrew & Epstein
23:44 Inside Fergie & Andrew’s Relationship
28:58 Can Fergie Recover?
31:00 Fergie’s New Plan

Can Sarah Ferguson ever recover from the Epstein fallout?
